name: Mohd Rayyan
bio: Product Solution Engineer at Juspay focused on merchant onboarding, payment integrations, and production payment systems. Skilled in Java, Python, JavaScript, SQL, REST APIs, backend systems, API debugging, and transaction analysis.
about: Product Solution Engineer at Juspay with hands-on experience in merchant onboarding, payment integrations, production go-lives, RCA, API tracing, service log analysis, and backend systems for real-time payment environments.
longAbout: I'm a B.Tech Information Technology graduate from Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology with an 8.70 CGPA, now working as a Product Solution Engineer at Juspay in Bengaluru. My work spans merchant onboarding, payment integrations, production go-lives, API debugging, RCA, transaction lifecycle analysis, and cross-functional delivery with engineering, product, and operations teams.
story: I'm a B.Tech Information Technology graduate from Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology with an 8.70 CGPA, now working as a Product Solution Engineer at Juspay in Bengaluru.
At Juspay, I deliver end-to-end onboarding and production go-live for international merchants, validating APIs, payment configurations, and integration readiness across multiple payment methods.
I work on production payment issues through API tracing, service log correlation, transaction lifecycle analysis, and debugging integration flows across distributed payment systems.

Earlier as a Product Solution Engineer Intern, I helped build internal AI-powered engineering tools for production debugging, payment transaction analysis, and system observability, improving debugging efficiency by 30%.
Alongside engineering work, I have led coding community initiatives, organized hackathons for 500+ students, and led a 4-member team to a Top 5 finish at the NSUT National Hackathon.
